message:
chore(beads): sync Track D planning and wasm follow-up metadata

Refresh the exported Beads JSONL with the latest planning and status metadata.

This sync does three concrete things:
- appends the new Track D contention epic (bd-3wop3) and the initial child beads
  for the WAL gate, page-cache sharding, EBR, seqlocks, and regression-gate work
- records SandySalmon's follow-up note on bd-3q88c describing the additional
  MVCC feature-forwarding fix needed for fsqlite-btree on native and wasm paths
- updates bd-l9k8e.9 to its latest closed-state export with the current close
  reason and timestamped completion metadata

No source code changes are included here. This is just the Beads JSONL export
capturing the current planning graph and issue commentary in git.
